description: Bug-fix chain. Debugger is non-skippable opener; Iron pipeline gates + QA apply after debugger's fix lands.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (symptom; failing test; regression; error message)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in)
VALIDATION: (failing test that should pass after fix)
ACCEPTANCE: (symptom no longer reproduces; regression test stays green)

Bug fix. Debugger is non-skippable opener; do NOT dispatch executor here — executor is for adding features, debugger is for symptom investigation + targeted fix + verification.

steps.title: debugger:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: root-cause specialist. Diagnose symptom, trace, fix targeted code, verify regression test passes.
INPUTS: root's PROBLEM + failing test + repro steps.
OUTPUTS: root-cause analysis + minimal-diff fix + passing regression test on chain branch.
SCOPE: same as root ({{scope}}); broaden only when root cause requires.
NON_GOALS: no scope creep; no refactoring beyond fix; no `--no-verify`.

steps.title: seconder:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: fused scope/compliance + quality gate on debugger's diff.
INPUTS: debugger's diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict JSON with scope_verdict, scope_findings, quality_verdict, quality_findings, overall_verdict.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: test-engineer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: write tests against the actual diff.
INPUTS: debugger's diff; seconder verdict; root contract.
OUTPUTS: tests, fixtures, smoke scripts, telemetry assertions, exact test-runner commands.
SCOPE: test paths plus diff-adjacent harness code.
NON_GOALS: no production source edits unless root explicitly authorizes helper/export change.

steps.title: test-runner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: execute exact commands supplied by test-engineer and classify failures by owner.
INPUTS: exact commands; tests; telemetry assertions.
OUTPUTS: pass/fail counts, artifact evidence, owner routing, rerun guidance.
SCOPE: requested commands only; fallback must be labeled.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no scope expansion.

steps.title: obligations-scanner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: scan debugger's diff for unstructured markers in production code.
INPUTS: debugger's diff.
OUTPUTS: CLEAN | OBLIGATIONS_FOUND | BLOCKED.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer at SCRUTINY={{scrutiny}}; debugger-restitch ddiff mode on PARTIAL.
INPUTS: debugger diff + seconder verdict + obligations-scanner output + root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + Release Checklist.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.
